summary: Stability overhaul — fixed connection issues, news loading, and Windows performance.
release_notes: Fixed WebSocket reconnect spiral that caused subscribe/unsubscribe flooding after TWS reconnects.
Disconnected overlay only shows when gateway is truly unreachable (10s interval, 5 consecutive failures).
Simplified L2 depth to one subscription at a time — no more retry loops or heartbeat re-subscribes.
Fixed Time & Sales going silent after heavy activity.
Rate-limited NT checks to stop them from blocking real order requests.
Charts stay live when app window is unfocused or backgrounded (Windows).
Time & Sales now shows all legitimate trade prints (unreported ticks no longer filtered).
Fixed news panel loading forever due to duplicate fetch abort race on startup.
News and company info now deferred 3s so charts and scanners load first.
Fixed 30+ second Yahoo Finance delays on Windows caused by IPv6 timeout fallback.
Isolated slow external calls (Yahoo, Google News) in dedicated thread pool — can never block charts or scanners.
Yahoo crumb acquisition hardened with thread lock and proper cookie flow.
KPI/company info skeletons now clear properly when data is unavailable instead of loading forever.
Auth gate bypassed automatically in dev mode when Cognito is not configured.
Ctrl+C now force-exits on second press when graceful shutdown hangs.
